details: The "Insulated Vehicle" scheme was launched by the Ministry Of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry & Dairying, Government of India, under the umbrella scheme "Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana". It aims to promote efficient and hygienic fish transportation systems. Under this scheme, a financial grant is provided to the beneficiaries for purchasing insulated (reefer) vehicles used in fish transportation. It seeks to minimize post-harvest losses, improve fish value chains, and enhance earnings of fish farmers by enabling cold-chain logistics.
benefits: Financial grant of up to ₹20,00,000/- per unit for the purchase of an insulated (reefer) vehicle.
40% of the unit cost for general category beneficiaries.
60% of the unit cost for Scheduled Caste (SC) and women beneficiaries.
Subsidy is applicable for one vehicle per beneficiary only.
Central assistance is released only after initiating fishery activity.
The applicant should agree that any losses in procurement, operation, or maintenance are their own responsibility, and not that of the Government of India or Haryana.
eligibility: The applicant should be a fish farmer.
The applicant must possess a Family Identity Card (Parivar Pehchan Patra).
The applicant must ensure that the fish transportation facility is maintained in working condition.
The applicant must not have availed a grant for a similar insulated (reefer) vehicle earlier.

online: For registration, click on “New User/Register Here” and fill in all the mandatory details i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number & password. Click on ‘Submit’.
Verify the OTP received in the provided Email and Mobile Number. Alternatively, click on the Verification Link to activate the profile.
Login to Apply for the Scheme:
The “Sign in here” option is available on the right side of the screen. Fill in the required credentials and click on the ‘Login’ button.
In the opened window, click on “Scheme/Services list”, and a list of schemes will appear on the screen.
Now, select the scheme and click on “Apply for Service/Scheme”.
Fill in all the details in the online application form and click on "Submit".
Type SARAL and send to 9954699899 to track your application.
Type SARAL<space><Application ID/Ticket No.> and send to 9954699899 to track your application/ticket.

documents_required: Agreement 1 (Agreement deed between the beneficiary and the fisheries department)
Birth Certificate (Voting Card/Birth Certificate/Aadhar Card/Matriculation Certificate)
Caste Certificate (Caste certificate from a first-class magistrate (Tehsildar))
Land Record (Land record from Tehsil (own land-Jamabandi, Nakal Akshizra, Farad) or registered lease deed of minimum 7 years)
Photographs of insulated vehicles with beneficiary
Detailed Project Report (DPR)/ Self Contained Proposal (SCP) (as per PMMSY guidelines)
Driving Licence of the beneficiary/driver and insurance of the vehicle

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply?
faqs.answer: Any fishery activity practitioner with a valid Family ID card who has not previously availed such a grant.

faqs.question: What is the maximum grant provided?
Can I apply for more than one vehicle?
faqs.answer: No, only one insulated vehicle is allowed per beneficiary.

faqs.question: Will I receive the subsidy before starting fisheries activity?
faqs.answer: No, the subsidy is released after the initiation of the fishery activity.

faqs.question: Are there any government liabilities if the vehicle gets damaged?
faqs.answer: No, all risks are borne by the beneficiary.

faqs.question: What is the application processing time?
faqs.answer: The application process takes approximately 40 days.

faqs.question: Are the service charges fixed?
faqs.answer: Yes, ₹10 for department service and ₹10 for Atal Seva Kendra.

faqs.question: Where can I apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant can apply at the local District Fisheries Office or the Antyodaya SARAL portal .

faqs.question: What documents are required to apply?
faqs.answer: Attached: Birth Certificate, Caste Certificate (For SC beneficiaries, issued by First Class Magistrate or Tehsildar), Agreement Form, Fisheries Training Certificate (Proof of having undergone training in fisheries-related activities), Bill/Receipt/Voucher, Bank Account Details (Copy of Passbook) and PAN Card, etc.

faqs.question: Is a driving license compulsory?
faqs.answer: Yes, a copy of the driving license must be provided.
